ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Ensure the Pinned Files view is available in the left sidebar when Obsidian starts. The view will not steal focus from your active sidebar tab.
ast.target: 确保 Obsidian 启动时，左侧边栏中显示“固定文件”视图。该视图不会从您当前活动的边栏标签页中夺取焦点。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a small "Pinned Files" label above the pinned list.
ast.target: 在固定文件列表上方显示一个小的“固定文件”标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove all pinned files from this list. This does not delete the files themselves.
ast.target: 从此列表中移除所有固定文件。此操作不会删除文件本身。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add Pinned Files to sidebar on startup
ast.target: 启动时在侧边栏显示固定文件

ast.name: name
ast.target: 固定/取消固定当前文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: No pinned files yet. Right-click a file and choose “Pin file”, or use the “Pin/unpin current file” command.
ast.target: 暂无固定文件。右键点击一个文件并选择“固定文件”，或使用“固定/取消固定当前文件”命令。
